tagline: Two days to understand how capital moves across Latin America
heroLead: Education, debate and real connection between investors, managers and founders. Six asset classes in one conversation.

about.title: The event
about.lead: Two days in Medellín where investors, family offices, fund managers, founders and project managers come together in one conversation across six asset classes: real estate, venture capital & private equity, public markets, alternatives, crypto and passion assets. Education, debate and deal-making in the same space.

thesis.title: Real Estate
thesis.desc: The patrimonial core of Latin America. Multifamily, build-to-rent and cross-border vehicles redefining real estate investing across the region.

thesis.title: Venture Capital & Private Equity
thesis.desc: Private capital in Latam: early stage, growth, mid-market buyouts and co-investments. Active funds, disciplined tickets, executable theses.

thesis.title: Public Markets
thesis.desc: Liquid markets and strategic allocation. Frameworks to build, rebalance and protect a multi-asset portfolio in today's environment.

thesis.title: Alternatives
thesis.desc: Hedge funds, commodities, gold and private debt. Attractive yields and decorrelation for resilient portfolios.

thesis.title: Crypto & Digital Assets
thesis.desc: Stablecoins, real-world asset tokenization and on-chain vehicles. Where traditional finance meets the digital economy.

thesis.title: Passion Assets
thesis.desc: Art, film, music and sports. The asset class growing double-digit annually that global family offices already hold. In Latam, it's just starting.

finalCTA.title: October 2026.
finalCTA.highlight: The conversation that defines capital in Latam.
finalCTA.lead: 400 people. Six asset classes. Two days. Your seat starts with a decision.
